variables.notes: No COGS rows were selected in the earlier mapping, and the visible D&A rows are general operating items rather than clearly cost-of-sales-specific. Conservative choice is to add nothing to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating expense line at the same level as External Expenses and Staff costs, so it appears outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket and should be added separately. It is also the summary row for the more granular D&A components below.
Looks like a component of the total 'Depreciation and amortization' row, so it should not be chosen when the summary row is available.
Looks like a component of the total 'Depreciation and amortization' row, so it should not be chosen when the summary row is available.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS are External Expenses and Staff costs. 'Depreciation and amortization' is presented as a separate same-level operating line, not as a sub-component nested within those selected rows. Use only the summary row to avoid double counting its components.
